signals.headline: Germany March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at +2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at +2.7% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's Federal Statistical Office (Destatis) announced on April 10, 2026, that annual consumer price inflation rose to +2.7% in March 2026, up from +1.9% in February and the highest since January 2024 (+2.9%), driven by a +7.2% surge in energy prices amid the Iran war.[1][2]  
This exceeds pre-war expectations of

signals.headline: Solana Hits All-Time Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders with Alpenglow Upgrade Progress | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits All-Time Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders with Alpenglow Upgrade Progress | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

As of April 14, 2026, Solana achieved a network record of 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions, driving a reported 10% SOL price surge.[1] The Alpenglow consensus upgrade was highlighted as advancing toward 150ms transaction finality
